author: chfast
content: The [High-Speed Software Implementation of the Optimal Ate Pairing over Barreto–Naehrig Curves](https://eprint.iacr.org/2010/354.pdf) has bugs in algorithms. They are listed in https://notes.ethereum.org/@ipsilon/pairing_linear_function_evaluation#Comparison-with-original-algorithm by <@450651770243252225>. Can someone check/confirm/review?
